chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Transfer Application No.09 of 2026 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ---- Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.1492/2026 2. For orders on office objection a/w reply 3. For orders on MA No.1493/2026 4. For hg. of main case 02.02.2026 Mr. Habib-ur-Rehman, advocate for applicant ----- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Exemption granted but subject to all just exceptions. 4. Mr. Ali Haider Salim, Addl: PG Sindh present in Court waives notice of this application. By consent this application is allowed on the ground that trial Court is lying vacant. Special Case No.143/2017 is withdrawn from the file of learned IV-Anti-Terrorism Court, Karachi and is transferred to VII-Anti- Terrorism Court, Karachi for disposal according to law. This Cr. Transfer Application is disposed of. JUDGE Rafiq/P.A
